exemplar.title:
To what extent has China's integration of AI-driven autonomous technologies
transformed its military capabilities and global strategic position since 2020?

detailedExemplarData.title:
To what extent has China's integration of AI-driven autonomous technologies
transformed its military capabilities and global strategic position since 2020?

strengths: The inquiry question is clear, focused and specific to Chinaâs post-2020 AI military use.
The contextual paragraph succinctly links technical, geopolitical and ethical dimensions to the question.
The 3 Câs connections explicitly align course concepts, content and contexts with the real-world example.
weaknesses: The inquiry prompts remain descriptive rather than analytical statements anticipating causal relationships.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The submission meets all descriptors for the top band: it formulates a specific question, situates it in a concrete example, and thoroughly connects to course material. It lacks only minor stylistic refinements, warranting the full 3 marks.

strengths: Each of the three core sources is clearly summarised with their central arguments identified.
Relevance of each source is justified in relation to the inquiry question.
Comparative perspective situates China within the broader AI arms-race effectively.
weaknesses: Critical evaluation of source bias or limitations is limited.
Discussion of some sources ends abruptly without linking to broader implications.
The inclusion of non-academic multimedia sources lacks clear justification.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: While sources are well described and justified, the analysis remains largely descriptive with underdeveloped critique and uneven depth. This places the work in the mid-band (partial discussion with some justification), meriting 3 of 6 marks, and allows mark-pooling to meet the total.

strengths: Analysis of operational, ethical and geopolitical impacts is sustained and linked to people and communities.
Evidence from multiple reputable sources is integrated to support evaluation.
Coherent synthesis across sections maintains a clear argument throughout.
weaknesses: Certain paragraphs revert to description rather than critical evaluation.
Opportunities for counter-examples or deeper critique of risk projections are missed.
Some repetition of previously made points reduces overall precision.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The evaluation is generally effective, sustained and well-supported, aligning with the top-band descriptor. However, occasional descriptive passages and limited counter-argument prevent full mastery, justifying a 4 out of 6.

strengths: The conclusion succinctly summarises key findings on capability gains and constraints.
It offers coherent insight into how AI autonomy has shifted dynamics.
Emerging trends and future regulation are referenced to extend the inquiry.
weaknesses: Discussion of future developments is broad and would benefit from concrete examples of regulatory frameworks.
Depth on specific emerging AI capabilities is limited and generalised.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The conclusion provides adequate insight and references emerging trends, meeting the descriptors for the mid-band. Its lack of depth and specificity prevents a higher mark, so 3 of 6 is appropriate.

strengths: Overall organisation follows a logical structure with clear headings and sections.
Use of a single illustrative image and a comprehensive bibliography enhances clarity and credibility.
weaknesses: Formatting glitches (broken URLs, truncated sentences) interrupt the flow.
Citation style is inconsistent and bibliographic entries are dense.
Language lapses and awkward phrasing detract from academic tone.
Media integration is minimal and not always clearly tied to the argument.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The presentation is organized sufficiently but inconsistently, and media use partially supports understanding. Persistent formatting and language issues restrict fluency, placing communication firmly in the mid-band and justifying 2 of 3 marks.

strandSelections.reasoning: Across both the written paper and the presentation transcript, the student analyses multiple impactsâoperational efficiency, escalation risks, surveillance advantages and ethical dilemmasâand consistently links these to people, communities and wider geopolitical dynamics.  Evidence from Brookings, CNAS and CEPA is cited in support of claims, showing good integration of source material.  The argument is generally sustained, moving from technical detail to ethical implications, although moments of repetition and limited counter-argument prevent it from being exemplary.  This meets the descriptor of âeffective, sustained and well-supportedâ, warranting a score towards the lower end of the top band.

The submission follows a logical structure (Section A, Section B, transcript) and uses headings, bullets and one illustrative image to aid comprehension.  However, lapses in grammar, awkward phrasing and occasional formatting glitches (broken URLs, stray characters) detract from fluency, and media use is limited to a single picture rather than being fully integrated.  Organisation therefore supports understanding only partially and not consistently, corresponding to the mid-level communication band.

The student formulates a clear, specific inquiry question focused on Chinaâs post-2020 use of AI military technology.  A concise paragraph then explains how this question will be examined through technical advances, geopolitical implications and ethical issues, explicitly naming the South China Sea drone-carrier example to anchor the investigation.  The subsequent 3 Câs section explicitly links three key course concepts, three content areas and three contexts to the chosen example, demonstrating a strong and deliberate alignment with Digital Society course material.  Overall, the inquiry focus is complete and thoroughly contextualised, satisfying the descriptors for the top band.

Three core sources are each summarised in separate subsections that identify their central arguments (technological advances, strategic objectives, challenges) and perspectives on Chinaâs AI integration.  For every source the student comments on why it is relevant and how it contributes to answering the inquiry, demonstrating justification rather than simple description.  While the discussion is largely synthesised rather than deeply critical, it is wide-ranging, balanced and clearly tied back to the research question, reflecting a thorough treatment that aligns with the 5â6 band.  A single mark of 5 recognises strong, but not flawless, depth of critique.

The final paragraphs provide a reasoned summary of how AI autonomy has âshifted global dynamics,â restate key findings on capability gains and note unresolved technical and ethical constraints.  They also outline future needs for international regulation, touching on emerging trends.  While the insight is clear and connected to the inquiry, the discussion of future developments is brief and somewhat general, lacking the depth expected for the highest band.  This aligns with a competent but not comprehensive conclusion (band 3-4), meriting 3 marks.

annotations.comment: The inquiry question is clearly stated and focused, providing a strong foundation for the investigation into Chinaâs AI-driven military transformation.
The single illustrative image adds visual interest but its connection to the inquiry focus is underdeveloped; consider integrating captions or data overlays to enhance relevance.
The explanation paragraph succinctly contextualizes the inquiry within technical, geopolitical and ethical lenses, demonstrating thorough connection to course concepts.
The real-life example names relevant reports but citation formatting is inconsistent; improve by using APA or MLA style uniformly and including full publication details.
The 3 Câs connections are well-structured, clearly aligning concepts, content and context with the inquiry example to support deeper analysis.
The inquiry prompts in list form are descriptive; rephrase as analytical statements that anticipate specific causal relationships (e.g., âAI autonomy enhances PLAâs deterrence byâ¦â).
The source discussion introduction sets up the analysis well but uses awkward phrasing (âspecial understandingâ); refine language for clarity and academic tone.
The student provides a clear description of Brookings Institutionâs key arguments and justifies its relevance effectively.
While claims are detailed, a critique of Brookingsâ potential bias or limitations would strengthen the evaluation of source reliability.
The summary of strategic objectives links back to inquiry effectively, demonstrating how this supports understanding of Chinaâs AI-driven military ambitions.
The global security implications paragraph is descriptive; add specific evidence or counter-examples to critically evaluate the predicted risks.
The role-in-answering paragraph ties source insights back to the central question, sustaining analytical coherence.
The CNAS report description is truncated mid-sentence, indicating incomplete analysis; ensure full quotations or paraphrases to avoid loss of meaning.
The comparative analysis section offers balanced perspective, effectively situating China within the broader AI arms race.
The articulated challenges could be deepened with data on technical failure rates or documented PLA hesitations to deploy AI in high-stakes scenarios.
The CEPA source description presents detailed examples of applications and constraints, strengthening the triangulation of evidence.
The challenges and limitations paragraph ends abruptly; complete the thought and link to broader implications to sustain analytical depth.
The role in answering section synthesizes insights across sources to address the research question, demonstrating sustained evaluation.
The conclusion section provides a broad summary but would benefit from detailed examples of future regulatory frameworks or specific emerging AI capabilities.
The bibliography is comprehensive and correctly lists diverse sources, enhancing credibility of research.
Some citations lack consistent access dates and have broken URLs; standardize citation style and verify link integrity.
The inclusion of multimedia tool Pictory.ai in the bibliography requires justification in the context of academic research; clarify its relevance.
Long bibliographic entries are dense; consider using hanging indent or bullet formatting to improve readability and navigation.
Overall organisation follows a logical structure, but occasional formatting glitches (broken URLs, truncated sentences) interrupt flow.
The sustained linkage of evidence to inquiry in sections B and C is effective and supports a coherent argument throughout.

strands.name: Inquiry Focus
strands.content: The work does not reach a standard described by the descriptors below.

strands.name: Inquiry Focus
strands.content:
The focus does not include all required elements and/or the real-world example is not
specific or relevant to the inquiry.

strands.name: Inquiry Focus
strands.content: The focus includes an inquiry question and a partial explanation of its connection to a specific, relevant real-world example and course concepts, content and contexts

strands.name: Inquiry Focus
strands.content: The focus includes an inquiry question and a thorough explanation of its connection to a specific, relevant real-world example and course concepts, content and contexts.

strands.name: Claims and perspectives
strands.content: 0 The work does not reach a standard described by the descriptors below.

strands.name: Claims and perspectives
strands.content: The discussion of claims and perspectives is limited and primarily descriptive in nature. Fewer than three sources are discussed or there is no justification for their use in the inquiry.

strands.name: Claims and perspectives
strands.content: There is a partial discussion of the claims and perspectives for each source that includes some justification for their usefulness in the inquiry, but this is not fully developed.

strands.name: Claims and perspectives
strands.content: There is a thorough discussion of the claims and perspectives for each source that includes a clear justification for their usefulness in the inquiry.

strands.name: Analysis and evaluation
strands.content: The work does not reach a standard described by the descriptors below.

strands.name: Analysis and evaluation
strands.content:
There is limited analysis and evaluation which is primarily descriptive in nature or of
limited relevance to the inquiry focus

strands.name: Analysis and evaluation
strands.content: The studentâs analysis and evaluation of impacts and implications for people and communities is adequate, but this is not always sustained or well-supported.

strands.name: Analysis and evaluation
strands.content: The studentâs analysis and evaluation of impacts and implications for people and communities is effective, sustained and well-supported by evidence

strands.name: Conclusion
strands.content: The work does not reach a standard described by the descriptors below.

strands.name: Conclusion
strands.content: The conclusion is limited with little further insight into the inquiry focus. Emerging trends and future developments are referenced with limited or no discussion

strands.name: Conclusion
strands.content: The conclusion provides adequate further insight into the inquiry focus with a partial discussion of emerging trends and future developments

strands.name: Conclusion
strands.content: on

strands.name: Communication
strands.content: The work does not reach a standard described by the descriptors below

strands.name: Communication
strands.content: The presentationâs organization and use of media are limited and do not support understanding.

strands.name: Communication
strands.content: The presentation is adequately organized and the use of media is at times coherent but this is not sustained or only partially effective in supporting understanding.

strands.name: Communication
strands.content: c
